author: lOrm
content: Issue calls for extracting a Graph data structure with explicit add_edge/would_create_cycle/sync_reverse methods, replacing Vec<String> adjacency with HashSet, running cycle detection AFTER staging all new edges on the proposed graph, and adding a fuzz test for graph consistency. Per the 2026-05-20 comment, point 3 (delete dead 'suppress unused warning' block) landed in src/session/task.rs. Remaining points 1 (Graph type), 2 (post-stage cycle detection), 4 (Vec->HashSet), 5 (fuzz test) are an integrated TaskManager refactor — graph type extraction + cycle algorithm rewrite must land together to preserve the blocks-iff-blocked-by invariant. Multi-day work; closing the cleanup-pass ticket while tracking the redesign under TaskManager architectural work.
